mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_goals ( user_id, title, description, goal_type, target_value, current_value, unit, start_date, end_date, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{goalType}, #{targetValue}, 0, #{unit}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_goals SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, goal_type = #{goalType}, target_value = #{targetValue}, unit = #{unit}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reading_goals WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_goals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY end_date ASC
SELECT * FROM reading_goals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY completed_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_goals WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_goals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_goals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_goals SET current_value = #{currentValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_goals SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
